title: GPU dispatch in the AOT-compiled path (not VM-only)
goal: An AOT-compiled binary (eshkol-run file.esk -> a.out) runs matmul on CPU BLAS even in the CUDA build (peak GPU ~11%); only VM/JIT (-r) dispatches to GPU. Make the cost-model GPU dispatch available to compiled binaries so production inference (which compiles) uses the GPU.
acceptance: compiled a.out doing a 1024x1024 matmul shows GPU util >50% on RTX 3050
